svg.title: Full system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: browser frontend, Flask API backend, and compiler core pipeline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the code editor UI look like for the compiler frontend?')
sendPrompt('What buttons should the compiler frontend have?')
sendPrompt('How should the compiler output panel display tokens, AST and errors?')
sendPrompt('What Flask routes do we need for the compiler API?')
sendPrompt('Should we add a /tokenize and /parse route separately?')
sendPrompt('What should the Flask API JSON response look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the full JSON response from the compiler API look like?')
g.text: source code → tokens → AST → {valid, errors, tokens, ast}
all phases run server-side; frontend only sends/receives JSON
